title: rom-weaver bundle
description: A distributable patching-workflow definition. Canonically named rom-weaver-bundle.json (plain, stream-codec compressed as rom-weaver-bundle.json.<gz|bz2|xz|zst>, or carried at the root of an archive alongside its patch/ROM members). rom-weaver also content-probes any *.json against this schema, so a differently named file that validates here is still recognized as a bundle. This schema mirrors the RomWeaverBundle Rust type; unknown fields are rejected.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference so editors bind autocomplete/validation when this bundle is hand-authored. Preserved verbatim by `bundle create --from`; never required.

version.description: Bundle schema version. This build writes version 3 (version 2 added the per-patch `basis` field; version 3 added stable patch identities and the author-controlled `version`/`author` fields) and reads versions 1-3.

rom.description: The input ROM the patch chain applies to. Omit entirely for a ROM-agnostic bundle; include with only `checks` (no url/path) for a checks-only bundle where the applying user supplies the ROM.

patches.description: Ordered patch chain: array order is the apply order. At least one entry.

output.description: Defaults for the final patched output. Overridable by explicit CLI flags / webapp edits.

checks.description: Expected checksums (algorithm -> lowercase hex) and/or exact byte size.

checksums.description: Map of checksum algorithm to expected lowercase hex digest.

headerMode.description: ROM copier-header handling. `auto` (default) re-adds emulator-required format headers and drops junk copier headers; `keep` retains; `strip` removes.

name.description: Display / output-naming file name (defaults to the source's base name).

url.description: Download URL for the ROM. Mutually exclusive with `path`.

path.description: Bundle-relative path (an archive member when the bundle ships inside an archive). Mutually exclusive with `url`.

checks.description: Expected checksums/size of the ROM itself (also verifies downloads). These describe the chain's INPUT.

id.description: Stable patch-slot identity retained when the source file is replaced.

version.description: Author-controlled release version for this patch; distinct from the bundle schema version.

author.description: Patch author credit. Added in version 3.

name.description: Display name for the patch card.

description.description: Free-form description shown on the patch card.

optional.description: When true the patch starts DESELECTED; omitted/false means applied by default. Every patch remains toggleable.

url.description: Download URL for the patch. Mutually exclusive with `path`.

path.description: Bundle-relative path (an archive member when the bundle ships inside an archive). Mutually exclusive with `url`.

inputChecks.description: Expected checksums/size of the ROM state this patch applies to, ONLY when it differs from `rom.checks` (a mid-chain step).

outputChecks.description: Expected checksums/size immediately after this patch is applied, ONLY when it differs from the bundle's final `output.checks`.

basis.description: What this patch's input checks were authored against: `base` (the bundle's rom - verified once up front; the patch's embedded checks are skipped when it runs mid-chain) or `previous` (the previous selected patch's output, the default). Omitted means previous/inferred. `basis: "base"` with omitted `inputChecks` relies on `rom.checks`; declaring it WITH `inputChecks` pins a specific variant. The escape hatch for checksumless formats (IPS) whose basis cannot be inferred. Added in version 2.

name.description: Default output file name for the patched result.

checks.description: Expected checksums/size of the final output once the full default chain is applied.
